top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran deal explained: What we know — and what remains unresolved
top_signals.summary: Stocks rose after a preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement, but questions remain over Hormuz, Israel and what follows a potential signing in Geneva.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia’s Jumbo Bond Sale Draws $85 Billion of Investor Demand
top_signals.summary: Nvidia Corp. has received about $85 billion of orders for its jumbo debt offering, underscoring relentless investor appetite for exposure to financing tied to the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
